Meaning.En: to get on or onto a vehicle, animal, or piece of equipment, especially for the purpose of riding or operating it
Meaning.Example: She mounted her bicycle and pedaled down the hill.

Situation.Vi: Người dùng xe đạp hoặc ngựa chuẩn bị khởi hành.
Situation.En: A cyclist or equestrian prepares to start riding.

Meaning.Vi: đặt, gắn, lắp (máy ảnh, đài phát thanh, thiết bị…)
Meaning.En: to fix or attach something firmly in position, especially for display or operation
Meaning.Example: The photographer mounted the camera on a tripod.

Situation.Vi: Kỹ thuật viên lắp đặt thiết bị quan sát hoặc truyền hình.
Situation.En: A technician installs or secures equipment such as a camera or antenna.

Meaning.Vi: đưa lên, nâng cao (vị trí, cấp bậc)
Meaning.En: to raise someone to a higher position, rank, or status
Meaning.Example: He was mounted to the position of director after five years of service.

Situation.Vi: Công ty công bố thăng chức cho nhân viên.
Situation.En: A company announces a promotion for an employee.
